data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria verified: file exists, 2+ test functions (8 found), all 10 assertions pass (SC 12 integration + SC 14 remediation). Existing test-bug-report-cli-validation.sh also passes (13/13). Updated ticket-create.sh to include actionable remediation text in warnings (ticket edit command, missing header names, template path).
